title: Attack No.1: Namida no Sekai Senshuken
titleRomaji: Attack No.1: Namida no Sekai Senshuken
titleNative: アタックNo.1 涙の世界選手権
synopsis: The Japanese team have been selected to compete in the World Junior Championships. Kozue, Midori, Kakinouchi and the other all-Japan teams, under coach Inokuma, work hard on rigorous training and head for New York, where the world's strongest players await. In the first round the team was immediately overwhelmed by the outstanding stamina of the American players, but the team managed. The final match has finally arrived. In order to defeat the spikes of the Soviet team, Kozue and her team devised a secret plan. Where will the glory shine? The time of the decisive battle is approaching.

title: Oyoge ya Oyoge
titleNative: 泳げや泳げ
synopsis: The animals are having a swimming contest. The strutting Saru-kun, a monkey, can't bring himself to admit that he cannot swim, and puts himself forward as a contestant. He dives right in, but immediately starts to sink. For some reason the bottom of the pool is littered with seaweed and coral, and a kappa, a type of water imp, also lives down there. Saru-kun fights with the kappa, and manages to seize the saucer off its head. The kappa agrees to let Saru-kun ride on his back while he swims, in exchange for the return of his saucer. Saru-kun then cruises right through the pool, looking for all the world like he is swimming under his own power, and wins the race successfully. But what happens in the end? (Source: Digital Meme)

title: Edokko Boy: Gatten Tasuke
titleNative: 江戸っ子ボーイ がってん太助
synopsis: Tasuke, a student in a police academy, wanted to be the manager of the academy and arrest all criminals in Edo city. Tasuke is still eleven years old, but, he really wanted to get rid of criminals so the world will be a better place to stay in. Tasuke have three other friends; Omon and the other two. With them, they work together and that is the start of a funny and sometimes serious adventure.

title: Honoo no Toukyuujyo Dodge Danko
titleNative: 炎の闘球女 ドッジ弾子
synopsis: The sequel to the legendary dodgeball manga Honou no Toukyuuji Dodge Danpei ! In this modern version of the hot-blooded dodgeball story, Danpei's daughter, Danko, follows in his footsteps, struggling to build a dodgeball team with the strongest fighting spirit in the modern age of 2025! Can Danko overcome the apathetic attitude of today's world? (Source: Corocoro, translated)

title: Pro Golfer Saru (1985)
titleNative: プロゴルファー猿
synopsis: Sarumaru is a wild child who lives in the countryside with his mother and five siblings. He's a self-proclaimed "professional golfer", playing betting golf as an amateur at a nearby golf course using his handmade driver. One day Sarumaru's golf technique is discovered by Mr. X, the shadow leader of the golf world, who tries to bring the boy under his control by sending against him his underlings. This is the story of the fierce battle between Sarumaru and Mr. X's golfers.

title: Dallyeola Hani
titleNative: 달려라 하니
synopsis: Hani is a small tomboy and slightly troublesome teenager who lives life a bit carelessly on her own since her Father lives abroad due to work in the Middle East and her Mother died when she was very small. The only thing Hany is very good at is running~ fast! Hong Du-kke is a new track and field coach of her school and takes notice in her talent and gets her to train with him. (Source: Cute in Korea)

title: Soccer Fever
titleNative: サッカーフィーバー
synopsis: Together with the hero of this series, Brian Thompson an ex-reporter, we get to relive the great games of the Football World Cup. The story begins with the first selection which took place in Uruguay 1930 until 1994 when it was held in the United States. We also get a depiction of Thompson's life from his youth until now. We also see the game brilliantly reborn through spectacular players like Franz Beckenbauer, Müller Gard, Eusebio and the greatest of them all, Pelé. (Source: A somewhat rough translation of a summary of the series from the French site "Planéte Jeunesse")
